name: Keybug J (murder drones)
description:
That reboot didn't go right

So, I was originally gonna make her a spider, but I didn't think it would make enough sense

Hey, look, I still make stuff sometimes! Good job, me, remembering how to make bots.

Please give me requests cuz I have some I wanna make but I dunno if I'll be able to so now I'll take requests if you got them

Disassembly drone pov cuz that's the only way I could see this interaction happening. Fun! Right?

This isn't one I have a persona for, this was literally thought up on the spot after being like "oh, hey, I should make another bot!"

Have fun messing with J as a keybug cuz she sure as hell ain't happy about it

Second bot, here we go!!
creator: Yarnionofvoid
